description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:latest Docker image, set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive, and define a before_script that sets DEBIAN_FRONTEND noninteractive, runs apt-get update -y, and installs zip, unzip, nodejs, jsonlint, and jq. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a "bundle addon" job that runs zip ClearURLs -r -FS clearurls.js browser-polyfill.js manifest.json img/* external_js/* html/* core_js/* css/* fonts/* _locales/* and stores ClearURLs.zip as an artifact. Also in the build stage add a "hash rules" job that runs sha256sum data/data.min.json | awk '{print $1}' > rules.min.hash, then node build_tools/minifyDataJSON.js "data/data.min.json" "data.minify.json", then sha256sum data.minify.json | awk '{print $1}' > rules.minify.hash and saves rules.min.hash, data.minify.json, and rules.minify.hash as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a "pages" job that runs only on the master branch, creates a public directory, copies img/clearurls.svg and data/data.min.json into it, recomputes SHA256 hashes for the public data, runs node build_tools/minifyDataJSON.js "public/data/data.min.json" "public/data/data.minify.json", recomputes its hash, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact.
